title: Priority
description: The single global spend order (spec §4.2). Authoritative and fully ordered: the server always returns the complete order after any mutation; clients never compute partial reorders (S1 freeze item: authoritative ordered priority). Per-request candidates = this order filtered by 'source supplies the requested model' and channel eligibility.

order.description: source ids, position 0 = spend first; MUST contain every non-deleted source exactly once
